summary: Successfully verified the production clone/json body fix for page creation. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI test confirmed page creation works without clone/body errors. The fix uses text-first parsing pattern (read as text, then JSON.parse) instead of response.clone().

page_creation_api.returns: Valid JSON with page object, bl_coins_earned, message

rapid_page_creation.note: No clone/body errors during stress test

steps: Verify page appears in My Pages tab

clone_removal.fix: Removed response.clone() calls, implemented text-first parsing

single_json_read.status: VERIFIED - each response body is read exactly once

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ api.js uses text-first parsing pattern (response.text() then JSON.parse)
✓ No response.clone() calls in frontend code
✓ Pages.jsx and MemberPagesSystem.jsx use single JSON read pattern
✓ Rapid page creation stress test passes without errors
seed_data_creation: Created test pages during testing (UI Test Page 05232d, plus automated test pages that were cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The production clone/json body fix has been verified. The key changes were: 1) Removed all response.clone() calls from frontend, 2) Implemented text-first parsing (read as text, then JSON.parse) in api.js apiRequest function. All page creation APIs work correctly. Frontend page creation flow works end-to-end without console errors.
screenshots_taken: .screenshots/my_pages.png - My Pages tab showing newly created page
